mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, user_id, provider, api_key, base_url, model, is_active, gmt_create, gmt_modified
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_model_config (tenant_id, user_id, provider, api_key, base_url, model, is_active, gmt_create, gmt_modified) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{provider}, #{apiKey}, #{baseUrl}, #{model}, #{isActive}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_model_config SET provider = #{provider}, api_key = #{apiKey}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, model = #{model}, is_active = #{isActive}, gmt_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId}
